Name: Lemon Peel Tang
Description: As bright as the sun at noon, this yellow guy is a real spark plug on the reef. It has a distinctive blue ring around its eyes that gives it a look like it’s wearing fancy spectacles, although it uses those eyes only to locate the best spots of algae before its neighbors.

Book_info.Habitat_Info: • Oceans|• Shores and Beaches|• Active at all hours
